source_intake_record.raw_question_text: In a heat-powered refrigerator, a turbine is used to drive the compressor using the same working fluid. Consider the combination where the turbine produces just enough power to drive the compressor and the two exit flows are mixed together. Find T_5 (x5 if in two-phase region) if the turbine and the compressor are reversible and adiabatic.
